text.title: javascript Output Contract
text.summary: Required config shape (tsconfig flags, eslint flat config, prettier, vitest).

example.note: All three strict flags on; no `any` allowed (enforced by eslint).
4 violations: any, default export, missing return type, missing context guard.

list.item: Default exports limited to framework requirements (Next.js pages, React.lazy).
External inputs validated with zod/valibot at controllers/route handlers.
Hooks have explicit return type interfaces.
Context consumer hooks throw when context is missing.
Node services have no HTTP imports; controllers don't have data-access code.
Tests run on Vitest; API calls mocked via MSW handlers in src/test/handlers.
